title: Poutine
description: A classic french-Canadian comfort food dish consisting of crispy fries topped with cheese curds and gravy.
instructions: Cut fries into 1/2-inch thick sticks and soak in cold water for 30 minutes.
Drain fries and dry with paper towels.
Fry fries in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Drain fries on paper towels and sprinkle with beef drippings.
Heat gravy in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add cheese curds to the gravy and stir until melted.
Serve fries hot with cheese curds and gravy on top.
